headline: 《痴迷》领衔今日娱乐热点
summary: 今日无新片上映，但《痴迷》《鬼上车》等剧集热度高涨，《福尔摩斯小姐3》持续领跑本周趋势。多部大片即将来袭。
summaryEn: No new movies released today, but shows like 'Obsession' and 'Ghost Ride' are trending hot, with 'Enola Holmes 3' leading the week. Several blockbusters are upcoming.

topTrends.title: 无职转生：到了异世界就拿出真本事

industryHighlights.text: 本周《痴迷》蝉联热搜榜首
industryHighlights.en: 'Obsession' tops trending list for the week

industryHighlights.text: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》等新片即将上映
industryHighlights.en: 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day' and others coming soon
